---
title: "Panel Reference"
---

This reference documents **every panel and subpanel** in the SciGraphs sidebar,
organized by tab. Each page describes what a panel does, when it is visible, the
meaning of every control, and the recommended workflow.

For a high-level map of the whole interface, see
**[The sidebar interface](../guide/interface.qmd)**.

## SciGraphs tab

The core combinatorial workflow.

| Panel | What it covers |
| --- | --- |
| [Data](scigraphs/data.qmd) | Importing from files, SQL databases, SuiteSparse, and reproducible pipelines; geospatial and temporal options. |
| [Layout & Positioning](scigraphs/layout.qmd) | Choosing and tuning layout algorithms; interactive layout; Network Splitter 3D. |
| [Graph Algorithms](scigraphs/algorithms.qmd) | Traversal (BFS/DFS), pathfinding, spanning trees, network flow. |
| [Analysis](scigraphs/analysis.qmd) | Centrality, community detection, directed analysis, statistics, topology. |
| [Visualization](scigraphs/visualization.qmd) | Node/edge appearance, scene presets, edge styles, text labels. |
| [Export & Tools](scigraphs/export.qmd) | Export to graph formats, node positions, statistics reports. |
| [Reproducibility](scigraphs/reproducibility.qmd) | Declarative pipeline replay and provenance. |

## OSMnx tab

[Street-network download and analysis](osmnx/index.qmd) — download, graph
operations, attributes, routing, accessibility, statistics, features, elevation,
and IO.

## City2Graph tab

[Heterogeneous urban graphs](city2graph/index.qmd) — data import, morphology,
transportation, mobility, proximity graphs, metapaths, and GeoAI export.
